F

fewest_transfers - Enum constant in enum class com.transportapp.graph.Criteria
 
findTop5RoutesByCity(Graph, List<City>, String, String, Criteria) - Method in class com.transportapp.routing.RouteFinder
Finds the top 5 optimal paths between two cities using all possible combinations of bus and train stations.
findTopKPaths(Graph, String, String, int, Criteria) - Method in class com.transportapp.routing.RouteFinder
Finds K the best paths between two graph nodes using the specified optimization criteria.
from - Variable in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
The name of the departure station.
